message:
fix: propagate dashboard Auto checkbox to card cache auto-refresh (#3224) (#3228)

The dashboard "Auto" checkbox only controlled a 30-second dashboard-level
refresh interval, but each card's useCache hook ran its own independent
auto-refresh timer (15s-10min depending on category). Unchecking "Auto"
did not stop these per-card timers, so users saw continuous data updates
even with the checkbox unchecked.

Added a global auto-refresh pause signal to the cache layer. When any
dashboard unchecks its "Auto" checkbox, all card cache intervals are
suppressed. Manual refreshes and initial data loads still work normally.

Files changed:
- web/src/lib/cache/index.ts: global pause state + subscribe pattern
- web/src/components/dashboard/Dashboard.tsx: propagate to cache layer
- web/src/lib/dashboards/dashboardHooks.ts: propagate from shared hook
- web/src/components/dashboard/CustomDashboard.tsx: propagate to cache

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
